title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!
